meanings.definition: thin strip of metal used to separate lines of type in printing
the activity of leading
examples: his leadership inspired the team

meanings.definition: take somebody somewhere
examples: We lead him to our chief
can you take me to the main entrance?
He conducted us to the palace

meanings.definition: have as a result or residue
examples: The water left a mark on the silk dress
Her blood left a stain on the napkin

meanings.definition: tend to or result in
examples: This remark lead to further arguments among the guests

meanings.definition: travel in front of; go in advance of others
examples: The procession was headed by John

meanings.definition: cause to undertake a certain action
examples: Her greed led her to forge the checks

meanings.definition: stretch out over a distance, space, time, or scope; run or extend between two points or beyond a certain point
examples: Service runs all the way to Cranbury
His knowledge doesn't go very far
My memory extends back to my fourth year of life
The facts extend beyond a consideration of her personal assets

meanings.definition: be in charge of
examples: Who is heading this project?

meanings.definition: be ahead of others; be the first
examples: she topped her class every year

meanings.definition: be conducive to
examples: The use of computers in the classroom lead to better writing

meanings.definition: lead, as in the performance of a composition
examples: conduct an orchestra; Barenboim conducted the Chicago symphony for years

meanings.definition: lead, extend, or afford access
examples: This door goes to the basement
The road runs South

meanings.definition: move ahead (of others) in time or space
cause something to pass or lead somewhere
examples: Run the wire behind the cabinet

meanings.definition: preside over
examples: John moderated the discussion

meanings.definition: indicating the most important performer or role
examples: the leading man
prima ballerina
prima donna
a star figure skater
the starring role
a stellar role
a stellar performance

meanings.definition: greatest in importance or degree or significance or achievement
examples: our greatest statesmen
the country's leading poet
a preeminent archeologist

meanings.definition: going or proceeding or going in advance; showing the way
examples: we rode in the leading car
the leading edge of technology

meanings.definition: having the leading position or higher score in a contest
examples: he is ahead by a pawn
the leading team in the pennant race
